call.transcription: Hello, this is Sarah from SmileCare Dental Clinic. I'm calling to let you know about our special packages. We have three options: Basic Package at $99/month includes routine cleanings, Premium Package at $199/month includes cleanings plus whitening, and Family Package at $299/month covers up to 4 family members. Would you be interested in scheduling a consultation?

call_analysis.call_summary: Successfully pitched dental packages. Customer interested in Premium Package and scheduled consultation.
